name: Mritunjay Pratap Singh
title: Backend Software Engineer
tagline: Building scalable microservices, event-driven systems & REST APIs
summary: Backend Software Engineer with 2+ years building scalable microservices, event-driven systems, and REST APIs. Proven expertise in Python, FastAPI, Django, and cloud technologies with a track record of delivering production-grade solutions.

highlights: Architected Communication Aggregator Service with FastAPI, MongoDB (Beanie ODM), MySQL, and Redis, processing 100K+ daily messages across WhatsApp/SMS/RCS for 4 business verticals with 40+ REST APIs and AWS SQS-based async processing.

Built multi-vendor Dialer Service using Flask with orchestrator pattern — vendor detection, RBI-compliant number selection, and fallback logic with Redis caching, reducing manual effort by 80% for 50+ agents.
Developed Receivable Engine for NACH/Cheque processing with FastAPI, PostgreSQL (SQLModel + asyncpg), and multi-stage AWS SQS pipelines for validation, realization, and reversal workflows.
Redesigned message tracking system with unique identifiers and audit trails, improving traceability by 100% and reducing support resolution time by 50%.
Developed internal tools using Django, DRF, and PostgreSQL to automate student support workflows.
Built and optimized REST APIs for real-time code evaluation and content delivery systems.

projects.name: Communication Aggregator Service
projects.description: Multi-vertical communication platform processing 100K+ daily messages across WhatsApp, SMS, and RCS.
highlights: Event-driven architecture with AWS SQS for async batch processing, Redis + RQ for job scheduling, and webhook handling.
Integrated MongoDB (Beanie ODM) for message storage, MySQL for origination data, and OpenSearch for lead analytics.
Self-service Excel upload with Pandas processing, reducing campaign launch time from days to hours.

projects.name: Multi-Vendor Dialer Service
projects.description: Extensible adapter framework with orchestrator pattern supporting Ozonetel, Knowlarity, and Exotel with RBI-compliant automated number selection.
highlights: Built vendor detection, RBI-compliant number selector, and fallback orchestration with Redis-backed caching.
Real-time webhook processing for call status updates, CDR logging, and automated call recording retrieval via AWS S3.

projects.name: Receivable Engine (NACH Processing)
projects.description: Automated payment reconciliation system handling NACH and cheque processing with batch validation, realization, and reversal workflows.
highlights: Event-driven architecture with multiple AWS SQS queues for upload, validation, realization, reversal, and email notification stages.
Async PostgreSQL with SQLModel + asyncpg, worker-consumer pattern for background processing.

education.institution: Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University
